name: Lentil Loaf (Brown)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lentils thoroughly.
2. Cover with water and cook for 10 to 15 minutes. Add more water if needed until you have a stiff puree.
3. Stir-fry onions in a little oil until soft, then add cayenne and cook for a few more seconds.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients. Add a little more stock or water if the mixture is too dry. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Grease a 1 lb loaf tin and press in the lentils mixture.
6. Bake at 375°F/190°C for 45 to 50 minutes.
7. Let stand for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a plate. Serve with vegetables.
